scientific_subject: Podocyte ultrastructure featuring primary processes and secondary foot processes (pedicels) interlacing over a glomerular capillary basement membrane.

visual_accuracy.textures: Smooth cellular membrane of the cell body contrasting with the fine, interlacing fibrous projections of the pedicels and the slightly granular surface of the basement membrane.
visual_accuracy.labeling_safe_zones: The peripheral margins of the frame and the negative space surrounding the central podocyte cell body.

negative_prompt: cartoonish, low-resolution, inaccurate anatomy, messy labels, blood-horror, vibrant-neon, artificial colorization, blurred cellular boundaries, macro-lens artifacts.
